2951717.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2951717.description: De Feeënraad vindt Poef oud genoeg om feeënpeetouder te zijn en vervolgens wordt hij geplaatst bij moeder Crocker, omdat ze ongelukkig is. Timmy, Wanda en Cosmo stellen zich ten doel mevrouw Crocker gelukkig te maken, zodat Poef weer naar huis kan.

2951844.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2951844.description: After what seems like forever, Mom and Dad have finally gotten hip to the fact that Timmy has fairy godparents. The question now is: how long can they keep Jorgen in the dark so that he won't take Wanda, Cosmo and Poof away forever?

2952570.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2952570.description: Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

2972978.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2972978.description: Timmy wenst meneer Crocker naar een andere school. Crocker komt terecht op een feeënschool, waar hij met een nieuw uitgevonden machine de magie uit zijn leerlingen probeert te zuigen om die te gebruiken voor zijn eigen gewin.

2973827.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2973827.description: When Timmy realizes that everyone in Dimmsdale has a pet except him, he adopts Sparky, a mischievous fairy dog. But owning a fairy dog proves to be a much bigger challenge than Timmy could have ever predicted.

2973869.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2973869.description: Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

2977698.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2977698.description: When Timmy gripes that being Mom is easier than being a kid, Wanda takes the bait and switches their brains. // Frustrated by his inability to catch fairies, Crocker turns his attention to hunting a new magical creature - leprechauns.

2977779.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2977779.description: After failing on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad's in his class!

2980378.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2980378.description: Timmy wishes that his Mom could sell a house to anyone. // Someone's kidnapped Big Daddy! With the big mob boss missing, Wanda is called in to run the family business.

2980456.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2980456.description: Life would be better with an older brother. At least that's what Timmy believes. // It's just another boring day, so Timmy wishes everything in school was mixed up like a 'find it' puzzle book.

2985010.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2985010.description: Timmy's tired of being the guinea pig when the fairies, anti-fairies and pixies compete to see 'who is the best magical creature in the universe?' He suggests a competition to determine once and for all who is best.

3009544.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3009544.description: Timmy, zijn vader en de scouts zijn uit kamperen. Pap is alleen vergeten de kampeerspullen en het brandhout mee te nemen. Van ellende besluit Timmy dan maar om enge verhalen te gaan vertellen.

2988644.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2988644.description: Timmy accidentally wishes both of his parents into a dangerous, never-ending surf-off! // When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

2988695.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2988695.description: The Turners win a contest to be the first family in space, only to learn that it was all a ruse by Dark Laser to imprison them in an alien zoo.

2990587.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2990587.description: Dad keeps trying to help Timmy with his homework. // Remy Buxaplenty has come home from military school for spring break. All he can talk about is how great his new school is, making Timmy, Chester and AJ very jealous in the process.

2990665.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2990665.description: Timmy's got all this merchandise from the 'Wet Willie' movie but it won't help him breathe underwater. // Timmy wishes for a magical device that allows him to change places with people in order to pass Mr. Crocker's test.

3004967.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3004967.description: Timmy wishes up a machine that allows him to merge with other items to become half-Timmy/half-whatever. // Timmy's tired of technology taking over and ruining his life so he wishes for a simpler world.

3005020.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3005020.description: Shya! Mark Chang is called back to Yugopotamia to become king while his father, under attack from a mystery assailant, flees for his life. // Dark Laser's back and tries to make Timmy his apprentice!

3013781.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3013781.description: Cosmo en Wanda vieren hun 10.000-jarig jubileum als feeënpeetouders. Als uitje bezoeken ze met Timmy een aantal peetkinderen uit het verleden. Maar als Timmy per ongeluk het verleden veranderd zijn de poppen aan het dansen.

3029439.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3029439.description: After what seems like forever, Mom and Dad have finally gotten hip to the fact that Timmy has fairy godparents. The question now is: how long can they keep Jorgen in the dark so that he won't take Wanda, Cosmo and Poof away forever?

3029510.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3029510.description: Timmy gets Jorgen fired. He helps Jorgen find a new job.

3000729.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3000729.description: De Feeënraad ontdekt dat Cosmo zijn eindverslag van de Feeënopleiding nooit heeft ingeleverd en trekt zijn diploma in. Dus gaan Timmy, Cosmo, Wanda en Sparky op zoek in Cosmo's herinnering wat er gebeurd kan zijn.

3050177.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3050177.description: When Timmy realizes that everyone in Dimmsdale has a pet except him, he adopts Sparky, a mischievous fairy dog. But owning a fairy dog proves to be a much bigger challenge than Timmy could have ever predicted.

3050216.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3050216.description: Cosmo loses his wand and Timmy and the gang must help find it.

3009712.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3009712.description: Wanda leest een aantal feeënsprookjes voor om Poef in slaap te krijgen.

3009933.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3009933.description: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy's house. Realizing it's Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. // Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him. A meteor threatens Earth and Timmy's the only one smart enough to stop it.

3009997.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3009997.description: Dad refuses to sell Sparky to his boss so he makes Dad's life miserable at work. Timmy and Sparky hatch a plan.

3069116.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3069116.description: Timmy wishes Mr. Dinkleberg would replace Dad as Squirrely Scout leader. Dad tries to regain Timmy's respect and his position. // Cosmo has amnesia and thinks he's Dad's genie. Timmy and Wanda must jog Cosmo's memory before Dad destroys the earth.

3069176.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3069176.description: Using Timmy's DNA, Crocker pretends to be Timmy from the future.

3018425.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3018425.description: Pap wint de lotto en van al dat geluk wordt de Anti-Feeën Wereld niet blij. Foep besluit om alle huisdieren te vervangen door gemene schepsels uit de dierenwinkel van de Anti-Feeën Wereld en stort daarmee een hoop ellende over Dimmsdale uit.

3018810.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3018810.description: Poof goes through the terrible twos. Foop goes through the terrific twos. Timmy and his fairies have to survive Poof's terrible twos. // Timmy wishes up the world's coolest smartphone but it soon starts to take over Timmy's life.

3018842.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3018842.description: Timmy wishes his ancestors had picked different careers. Timmy's family becomes rich and spoiled.

3025925.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3025925.description: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy's house. Realizing it's Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. // Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him. A meteor threatens Earth and Timmy's the only one smart enough to stop it.

3025995.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3025995.description: Vicky decides to be an actress and makes Timmy help her land her first role.

3027758.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3027758.description: Timmy blijkt zijn feeën te moeten delen met Chloe, het nieuwe meisje op school. Als Chloe beseft dat ze haar magie aan kan wenden voor het goede, wenst ze dat iedereen in Dimmsdale alles met elkaar deelt. Een grote chaos is het gevolg.

3027877.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3027877.description: At a park clean up, Timmy wishes the animals would pick up after themselves. The animals unite and launch an all-out attack on Timmy. // Timmy helps his mom make a viral video. Crocker sees it and thinks Mom is a magical Breakfast Troll.

3028185.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3028185.description: Timmy, his dad, and fairies get stuck in a board game created by Cosmo.

2986927.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2986927.description: Timmy is verslaafd aan een Heikneuter-game. En Chloe wordt tegen haar zin gebombardeerd tot Katmeid, de rechterhand van Katman. // Timmy's vader wordt burgemeester maar dat loopt uit de hand.

2987026.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2987026.description: Foop becomes Vicky's anti-fairy godparent. Vicky and Foop terrorize Timmy and the kids of Dimmsdale. Foop tells Vicky that the reason Timmy has thwarted her all these years is because he has fairy godparents.

2987838.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2987838.description: Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic. Dad thinks he can talk to animals.

2991003.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2991003.description: After failing on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad's in his class! // Unable to resist the taste of Jorgen's grandmother's delicious brownies,Timmy steals the recipe.

3037559.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3037559.description: Tired of Mom's terrible dinners, Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

3039103.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3039103.description: Cosmo is ousted from the house for being too annoying, but quickly finds relief in becoming Dimmsdale's newest & greatest super hero.

3041620.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3041620.description: Poof is trying to get the hang of shape shifting - unfortunately he takes after Cosmo! // Timmy's been running Cosmo and Wanda ragged so Jorgen takes him to 'Wishing Well'.

3041930.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3041930.description: Dad entrusts Timmy with washing and preserving his classic Stryker Z sports car! // Wanda worries that Poof doesn't have interaction with other fairy babies, so Timmy turns the adult fairies into babies, so Poof can play with.

2992607.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2992607.description: Chloe sluit zich aan bij de Eekhoornscouts en redt de groep door ze aan hun eerste medaille te helpen. // Als Timmy en Chloe erachter komen dat ze op dezelfde dag jarig zijn wordt het een gevecht wie het leukste feestje organiseert.

2996214.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2996214.description: Tired of Mom's terrible dinners, Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world. // The Turners win a contest to be the first family in space, only to learn that it was all a ruse by Dark Laser to imprison them in an alien zoo.

2996863.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2996863.description: When Jorgen comes down with the Trick-ups, it's up to Cosmo to enforce Da Rules.

2999689.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2999689.description: Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic. Dad thinks he can talk to animals.

3004308.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3004308.description: Dad entrusts Timmy with washing and preserving his classic Stryker Z sports car!

3004379.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3004379.description: Vicky is determined to get a job after Timmy's parents fire her. // Timmy wishes up a girlfriend for Crimson Chin and soon the Chin dating a woman named Golden Locks except now the comic is both boring and romantic.

3014258.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3014258.description: Chloe is gek op tv-programma: De Eerlijke Beertjes. Zo erg, dat ze de beertjes echt wenst. Timmy en Wanda kunnen de beertjes niet uitstaan. // Timmy's vijanden proberen hem te pakken zodra Wanda en Cosmo weg zijn.

3021035.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3021035.description: Timmy accidentally wishes both of his parents into a dangerous, never-ending surf-off! // When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

3035923.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3035923.description: Chloe wordt Beste Burger van Dimmsdale. Daarna krijgt ze vreselijke jeuk van een huiduitslag. Iedereen denkt dat 't stress is, maar klopt dat wel? // Pap wil een grote vis vangen, maar Cloe wenst dat de vissen zich kunnen verdedigen.

3042639.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3042639.description: Dad longs for a simpler life and decides to convert the Turner home into a farm. // When monsters start appearing in Dimmsdale, Mr. Crocker launches a web show to expose them.

3048869.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3048869.description: Vicky decides to be an actress and makes Timmy help her land her first role. // Dad accidentally flushes Timmy and the fairies down the toilet.

3048928.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3048928.description: Timmy wishes Dad was Mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

3054602.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3054602.description: Wanda en Cosmo worden als genten door de ouders van Chloe teruggezet in het oerwoud.

3054731.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3054731.description: Timmy likes a new girl at school. He wishes he was 'emo' and stops caring about everything. // Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

3055460.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3055460.description: Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

3060892.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3060892.description: Foop is back! This time, he's seeking to be the most popular kid at magic school. His plan? Running for class president against Poof. // Dad changes Timmy's room into a surveillance center to prove that his kindly neighbor, Dinkleberg, is truly evil.

3067720.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3067720.description: Poof finally becomes a fairy godparent. Unfortunately, it's to Mrs. Crocker.

3067787.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3067787.description: Timmy and Chloe find out they have the same birthday and compete for the best party.

3075037.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3075037.description: De Anti-Fee Foep probeert als Blauwe Engel Timmy en zijn vrienden om te turnen. Chloe valt er niet voor. // Chloe doet er alles aan om Mark Chang, de alien, geaccepteerd te zien.

3075143.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3075143.description: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad's life was like an action movie. // Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

3075691.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3075691.description: Timmy wishes up 5000 Timmys for the Planet of the Dads. The Timmys kidnap Cosmo and Wanda.

3080565.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3080565.description: Poof and Foop compete to win the affections of Goldie Goldenglow, a magical new girl at Spellementary School (who's shaped like a triangle) while participating in the Spellementary School play, 'Mr. Cookie's Happy Day'.

3086108.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3086108.description: Timmy wishes that his Mom could sell a house to anyone. // Someone's kidnapped Big Daddy! With the big mob boss missing, Wanda is called in to run the family business.

3086176.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3086176.description: Chloe joins the Squirrely Scouts and saves the troop by helping them get their first merit badge.

3091631.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3091631.description: Nadat Timmy en Chloe het hondje van Dark Laser redden, wordt hij als dank hun bodyguard. // Timmy en Chloe wensen een vriendin voor Meester Crocker.

3091741.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3091741.description: Dad refuses to sell Sparky to his boss so he makes Dad's life miserable at work. Timmy and Sparky hatch a plan. // Timmy wishes his ancestors had picked different careers. Timmy's family becomes rich and spoiled.

3092504.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3092504.description: Dad and Crocker make a deal. As a result, Crocker becomes best friends with Dinkleberg.
